description: §19.7 negative (full enumeration) — a `!{}` handler naming BOTH error variants (.NotFound + .Timeout) is exhaustive by enumeration; E-TYPE-080 does NOT fire. The full-coverage counterpart to the wildcard escape.
rationale: §19.7: an error handler covering every variant of the error enum is exhaustive -> no E-TYPE-080. LoadError's full variant set {NotFound, Timeout} is named.
